sector.eyebrow_zh: 静电耗散 · 聚酰亚胺与聚酯
sector.subhead_en: Protection for your ESD-sensitive components — durable static-dissipative labels that stay compliant through reflow, wash and handling.
sector.subhead_zh: 为静电敏感元件提供保护 —— 耐用的静电耗散标签，在回流、清洗与操作全程保持合规
sector.intro_en: Polyonics ESD-Safe polyimide and polyester label materials protect your most sensitive devices from electrostatic charges arising from both human contact (HBM) and charged devices (CDM). They provide durable static-dissipative top surfaces and use low-charging pressure-sensitive adhesives (PSA) and liners that generate less than 125 volts on liner removal and again when removed and repositioned.
sector.intro_zh: Polyonics 防静电聚酰亚胺与聚酯标签材料，可保护最敏感的元件免受人体接触（HBM）与带电器件（CDM）所产生的静电危害 材料具有耐用的静电耗散表面，采用低电荷压敏胶（PSA）与离型纸 —— 揭离离型纸以及取下再贴时，产生的电压均低于 125 伏

why.text_en: Durable top coat holds surface resistance between 10⁹ and 10¹¹ ohms — dissipating charge without the risk of a hard short.
why.text_zh: 耐用面涂层将表面电阻控制在 10⁹ 至 10¹¹ 欧姆之间 —— 在不造成硬短路风险的前提下耗散静电

why.text_en: Low-charging PSA and liners stay below 125 volts on liner removal and again when repositioned — protecting HBM- and CDM-sensitive devices.
why.text_zh: 低电荷压敏胶与离型纸在揭离与再贴时电压均低于 125 伏 —— 保护对 HBM 与 CDM 敏感的器件

why.text_en: High- and low-temperature dimensional stability plus chemical resistance — the label reads clearly after reflow, aggressive wash and handling.
why.text_zh: 高低温尺寸稳定性加化学耐受 —— 标签在回流、强力清洗与操作后仍清晰可读

applications_en: ESD-safe identification, masking and tracking of static-sensitive devices
applications_zh: 静电敏感器件的防静电标识、遮蔽与追溯
